response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and appropriate seniority level (15+ years), they are fundamentally misaligned for this C++ systems role. Their C++ expertise is severely outdated (last used 2015), their career has pivoted toward web/full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js, and they lack any background in industrial automation, embedded systems, industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), or critical protocols (MQTT, Modbus, IEC 61850). The role requires a systems/embedded engineer with current C++ expertise and domain knowledge; this candidate is a full-stack/web specialist.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience across diverse platforms demonstrating broad technical competence
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and collaborative development methodologies
Experience architecting event-driven systems and mentoring team members on coding standards
concerns: C++ expertise is severely outdated (last production use in 2015; 11 years ago) with minimal recent experience for a C++ developer role
No background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or machinery manufacturing—complete domain mismatch
Missing expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT protocol, and secure SDLC practices central to role responsibilities

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IoT background
